Interface IuParameterizedElement

All Known Subinterfaces:
IuConstructor<C>, IuExecutable<D,R>, IuMethod<D,R>, IuType<D,T>, ParameterizedFacade
All Known Implementing Classes:
ConstructorFacade, ExecutableBase, MethodFacade, ParameterFacade, ParameterizedElement, TypeFacade, TypeTemplate
public interface IuParameterizedElement
Facade interface for an element that defines type parameters.
See Also:
